architecture: Layers: View -> Controller -> Repository -> Provider -> native ForgeRock (AuthMethodChannel).
All API access goes through the native AuthMethodChannel — never use dio/http directly.
GetX screen unit = Binding + Controller + Page + Repository; register the route.
conventions: UI strings in Vietnamese; use the i18n and date-format helpers.
Reuse shared widgets from core/widgets before making new ones.
Build/run only via scripts/flutter_flavor.sh with the correct flavor.
lint: Follow analysis_options.yaml (flutter_lints); fix hits within changed scope.
Common rules: prefer_const, single-quotes, avoid_print, use ScreenUtil sizing.
Suppress a rule only with a justified inline ignore; run the pre-finish checklist.
templates: scaffold-data: Provider (endpoint via AuthMethodChannel) + Model (null-defensive fromJson) + Repository method.
scaffold-screen: Binding + Controller + Page + route registration following the GetX template.
Do not invent a new structure — copy the getx-conventions template.
design-system: Never hardcode colors — use semantic tokens (5 layers: primitives -> semantic -> ThemeController -> ThemeData).
Size everything with ScreenUtil (.w/.h/.sp); no raw pixel literals.
Toast/loading/dialog via the shared core/widgets recipes.
library-docs: Reference: architecture.md, conventions.md, getx-conventions.md, theme-tokens.md, toolkit.md, rules.md.
Auth/API is native ForgeRock via AuthMethodChannel — no Dart HTTP client libraries.
State/storage: GetX + GetStorage. Do not add competing state libraries.
